infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CalorRidge uses your camera to photograph meals and analyze their nutritional content.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CalorRidge accesses your photo library so you can select meal photos for nutritional analysis.
